name_en: Inspired by the 1970s, Bottega Veneta Women's Logo Shoulder Bag. Smooth leather offers a clean, sharp look, embodying the efficiency and resilience of a career woman. Premium metal pendant on the front, overall retro and elegant. Excellent leather with a soft touch. This Bottega Veneta series is truly beautiful for everyone, downplaying complex styling and not competing for attention, simply interpreting itself with the best quality.
